sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Pacific Biosciences of California unveils oncology workflow solutions at industry event
feed.summary: Pacific Biosciences of California is presenting its HiFi sequencing technology and Vega system at the AACR26 conference in San Diego. The company aims to showcase how its solutions can enhance oncology workflows and provide comprehensive insights into cancer biology with high accuracy. This demonstration builds on previous advancements in HiFi sequencing for detailed cancer variation analysis and automated epigenetic data detection.

feed.title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. TO ANNOUNCE 1ST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS AND CONDUCT CONFERENCE CALL ON APRIL 21, 2026
feed.summary: Peoples Bancorp Inc. (Nasdaq: PEBO) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings before market open on April 21, 2026, and conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. EDT. The call will feature commentary from President and CEO Tyler Wilcox and CFO Kathryn Bailey, followed by a Q&A session. A webcast and archived replay will be available on the company's website.

feed.title: PLDT, Smart ready to limit access to Roblox
feed.summary: PLDT Inc. and Smart Communications, Inc. have announced their readiness to restrict access to Roblox following government concerns about the platform's safety for children. This decision comes after reports of exploited user-generated content leading to potential abuse and violent extremism on the platform. The National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) is collaborating with industry partners to assess appropriate actions to create a safer digital environment for children.

feed.title: (PAY) Volatility Zones as Tactical Triggers
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily discusses Paymentus Holdings Inc. Class A (NYSE: PAY), highlighting stable neutral readings in shorter horizons which could ease a long-term weak bias. It outlines an exceptional short setup with a 60.1:1 risk-reward ratio and provides three distinct AI-generated trading strategies tailored for different risk profiles. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal analysis, identifying support and resistance levels.

feed.title: Palladyne AI (PDYN) CFO discloses tax-related share sale
feed.summary: Palladyne AI Corp.'s Chief Financial Officer, Trevor Thatcher, sold 3,030 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $5.5463 per share. This sale was explicitly made to cover income tax liabilities from vesting restricted stock unit awards, not as a discretionary trade. Following the transaction, Thatcher directly owns 180,258 shares, including shares represented by RSUs.

feed.title: Oramed (NASDAQ: ORMP) CSO uses 435,084 shares to cover RSU tax
feed.summary: Oramed Pharmaceuticals Inc.'s Chief Scientific Officer, Miriam Kidron, reported a tax-related disposition of 435,084 common shares to cover tax withholding obligations from vested Restricted Stock Units. The shares were valued at $3.31 each. Following this transaction, Kidron directly holds 1,133,138 shares of Oramed common stock.

feed.title: Rinzimetostat Phase 3 dose and cash runway update from ORIC (NASDAQ: ORIC)
feed.summary: ORIC Pharmaceuticals announced it is advancing rinzimetostat (ORIC-944) to Phase 3 at a 400 mg once-daily dose in combination with darolutamide for metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer, based on favorable efficacy and a differentiated safety profile from Phase 1b optimization data. The company reported strong PSA responses and a good tolerability profile at this dose, with fewer adverse events and dose modifications compared to higher doses or competitor regimens. ORIC also updated its financial position, showing approximately $412 million in cash and investments, providing a cash runway into the second half of 2028, sufficient to execute planned registrational trials for rinzimetostat and another late-stage candidate, enozertinib.

feed.title: Director-linked entity boosts PagSeguro (NYSE: PAGS) stake with 498K-share buy
feed.summary: PagSeguro Digital Ltd. director Luis Frias, through an indirectly linked corporation, purchased 498,500 Class A common shares across two transactions on March 27, 2026. The purchase involved 249,250 shares at $9.99 and another 249,250 shares at $9.94, totaling approximately $4.97 million. These transactions have significantly increased the indirect holdings of Class A shares for entities linked to Frias.

feed.title: Onconetix CEO Karina Fedasz to step down, David White to succeed
feed.summary: Onconetix (ONCO) announced that Karina Fedasz will step down as interim CEO, with David White appointed as her successor, effective March 18. Fedasz will remain as interim CFO. Sammy Dorf has also been appointed to the company's board of directors and audit committee.

feed.title: [ARS] OLD REPUBLIC INTERNATIONAL CORP SEC Filing
authors: [ARS] OLD REPUBLIC INTERNATIONAL CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Old Republic International Corp (ORI). The filing, categorized as an Annual Report to Security Holders, was accepted on March 31, 2026, and indicates a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article provides details on the filing, including a link to the original document on SEC EDGAR, along with company overview, market rankings, and recent news.

feed.title: OPER Should I Buy
feed.summary: This page provides an analysis of the stock OPER for 2026, including its current price, analyst ratings, and financial data. It indicates that no Wall Street analysts currently forecast a rise in OPER's stock price, with zero buy, hold, or sell ratings. The page also shows no available growth, profitability, or efficiency data.

feed.title: Nexstar Tells Judge Aspects Of Tegna Merger "Cannot Be Reversed"
feed.summary: Nexstar Media Group has informed a judge that certain aspects of its merger with Tegna, which was temporarily halted by a restraining order, cannot be reversed immediately. The company warned the court that full compliance with the order would create operational harm, regulatory conflicts, and a governance vacuum, jeopardizing Nexstar and the Tegna assets. DirecTV, which successfully secured the restraining order based on antitrust claims, plans to file a response to Nexstar's assertions.

feed.title: Insider Sell: John Muse Sells 1,500 Shares of Nexstar Media Grou
feed.summary: John Muse, a Director at Nexstar Media Group Inc (NXST), sold 1,500 shares of the company on March 27, 2026, reducing his holding to 27,161 shares. This transaction is part of a broader trend of insider selling at Nexstar, with no insider buys and 42 insider sells recorded over the past year. The stock was trading at $219.63, and with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.17, GuruFocus indicates it is fairly valued.

feed.title: OFG Bancorp (OFG) director awarded 1,500 Restricted Units under incentive plan
feed.summary: OFG Bancorp director Sue Harnett was granted 1,500 Restricted Units under the company's 2007 Omnibus Performance Incentive Plan. These units, awarded at a stated price of $0.00, will convert to 1,500 shares of Common Stock upon the lapse of the Restricted Period on February 26, 2027. This transaction is a compensation grant and not a stock purchase, increasing Harnett's direct holdings of Restricted Units to 1,500.

feed.title: NextNRG to Launch the EzShop, Powered by Gopuff, to Deliver Both Fuel & Groceries Directly to Customers
feed.summary: NextNRG, Inc. announced the launch of EzShop, an integration within its EzFill mobile fueling platform, powered by Gopuff. This new service will allow customers to order over 5,000 everyday essentials, including groceries and household items, for delivery alongside their fuel. The partnership aims to transform NextNRG into a digital commerce platform, creating a new revenue stream and enhancing customer convenience by modernizing the traditional gas station experience.

feed.title: Organon (OGN) EVP gains shares via RSU vesting and tax withholding
feed.summary: Organon & Co.'s Executive VP, Corp. Dev., Daniel Karp, exercised 14,184 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) which converted into common stock. To cover tax obligations, 4,446 shares were withheld at a reference price of $5.84. Following these transactions, Karp directly holds 57,153.923 shares of Organon common stock.

feed.title: InspireMD to Participate in Upcoming 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: InspireMD, Inc. (Nasdaq: NSPR) has announced its plans to present at the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference. The presentation is scheduled for Tuesday, April 14th, at 12:45 pm Eastern Time. InspireMD develops the CGuard® Prime carotid stent system and aims to make its proprietary MicroNet™ mesh technology the industry standard for carotid stenting.

feed.title: InspireMD to Participate in Upcoming 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: InspireMD, Inc. (Nasdaq: NSPR) announced its participation in the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on Tuesday, April 14th, at 12:45 pm ET. The company, known for its CGuard® Prime carotid stent system, will present its advancements in stroke prevention. A live audio webcast and archived recording will be accessible through InspireMD's investor relations website.

feed.title: NEXGEL delays earnings call a week to add detail on Celularity deal
feed.summary: NEXGEL (NASDAQ:NXGL) has rescheduled its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results conference call to April 8, 2026, at 4:30 P.M. ET. The delay is intended to provide shareholders with more detailed information regarding its previously announced proposed transaction with Celularity Inc. The company confirmed that its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025, was filed with the SEC on March 31, 2026.

feed.title: OFLX SEC Filings - Omega Flex 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Omega Flex (OFLX) SEC filings, including annual reports (10-K), quarterly earnings (10-Q), material events (8-K), and insider trading forms. It features AI-powered summaries to highlight key points from these regulatory documents for investors. Recent filings detail CEO phantom stock awards, institutional ownership updates, and quarterly financial results for Q3 and Q2 2025.

feed.title: Is Ingersoll Rand (IR) at an inflection point?
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether Ingersoll Rand (IR) is at an inflection point. It seems to be a financial market analysis focused on the company's stock performance and potential future trajectory.

feed.title: Hilton Hotels' Loyalty Program Evolution: Why Hilton Honors and World of Hilton Drive Investor Inter
feed.summary: Hilton Hotels is strategically leveraging its Hilton Honors loyalty program and World of Hilton platform to enhance customer retention, drive revenue growth, and attract investor interest, particularly in North America. These programs offer personalized rewards, exclusive experiences, and digital innovations, contributing to high member engagement and significant ancillary revenue streams. The loyalty-driven model, combined with an asset-light franchising approach and strong occupancy trends, positions Hilton as a resilient investment in the evolving hospitality market.

feed.title: PACB PE Ratio & Valuation, Is PACB Overvalued
feed.summary: This article analyzes the valuation of Pacific Biosciences of California Inc (PACB), suggesting it is currently in the "Fair zone" with a forward PS ratio of 3.24. It provides a fair price range between $0.88 and $8.71 based on relative valuation. However, it also notes that PACB's P/B ratio is significantly higher than its historical averages and its P/S ratio, while below competitors, still appears unsustainable given its revenue growth.

feed.title: PEDEVCO 10-K: Revenue $45.8M, EPS $(2.25)
feed.summary: PEDEVCO reported an increase in oil, gas, and NGL revenues to $45.8 million, up 16%, driven by higher volumes. However, the company recorded a net loss of $10.4 million, or $(2.25) per share, due to merger-related expenses and other non-operating charges. Despite production expansion and growth in proved reserves, operating income swung to a loss, largely impacted by integration activities and increased operating costs.

feed.title: Is The Tractor Supply Company an Undervalued Dividend Stock to Buy?
feed.summary: The article discusses whether Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO) is an undervalued dividend stock, highlighting its strong position to navigate macroeconomic challenges. It also features a promotional section from Motley Fool's "Stock Advisor," showcasing past successful stock recommendations like Nvidia, Apple, and Netflix, and encouraging readers to subscribe for new alerts.

feed.title: Q Q Q ETF Analysis: Tech Valuations & 2026 AI Earnings Growth - News and Statistics
feed.summary: The Invesco QQQ ETF has experienced a recent downturn, but concerns about tech stock valuations may be overblown. The S&P 500 Information Technology index's forward price-to-earnings ratio is similar to the broader S&P 500, and strong earnings growth, particularly from AI, is projected to continue through 2026 and 2027. However, the efficacy and profitability of substantial AI investments by companies remain an area of uncertainty that could impact future share prices.

feed.title: CEO’s Letter
feed.summary: Martina Cheung, President and CEO of S&P Global, shares insights on the company's performance and strategy in a dynamic global landscape, highlighting the significant role of AI. The letter details an excellent 2025 with an 8% revenue increase and 14% adjusted diluted EPS growth, driven by strategic advancements in market leadership, high-growth adjacencies like private markets and energy, and amplified enterprise capabilities with AI. S&P Global plans strong, profitable growth in the coming years by focusing on its mission of Advancing Essential Intelligence.

feed.title: NatWest Group (NYSE: NWG) reports total voting rights of 31.9B shares
feed.summary: NatWest Group plc announced its total voting rights and share capital as of March 31, 2026. The company reported 31,928,561,928 total voting rights across all share classes, derived primarily from 7,981,657,342 ordinary shares, each carrying four voting rights. This information is crucial for shareholders to determine their notification obligations under the FCA's Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

feed.title: After raising $8.1M, Nuvve says cash grew to $5.5M in Q4
feed.summary: Nuvve Holding Corp. (NVVE) reported a financial update for Q4 and full-year 2025, noting a cash and cash equivalents balance of $5.5 million as of December 31, 2025, up from $0.4 million at the end of 2024. The company generated $8.1 million in gross proceeds through preferred stock offerings and warrant exercises. Despite a decline in EV adoption in the school bus market, Nuvve is pivoting its strategy towards stationary storage aggregation services, expecting growth in North America, Europe, and Japan.

feed.title: NSTS PE Ratio & Valuation, Is NSTS Overvalued
feed.summary: This article analyzes the valuation of NSTS Bancorp Inc. (NSTS) using various financial ratios. It indicates that NSTS is currently in the "Fair zone" based on its forward PS ratio compared to its five-year average. The article also compares NSTS's P/B ratio and FCF yield to historical averages and discusses its valuation relative to competitors.

feed.title: Nerdy to Participate in Centri Capital Conference
feed.summary: Nerdy Inc. (NYSE: NRDY) announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Jason Pello, will participate in a fireside chat at the Centri Capital Conference on April 14, 2026. A live webcast of the fireside chat will be available on Nerdy's investor relations website, with an archived replay available afterward. The company, known for its live online learning platform, connects learners with experts using AI-powered technology.

feed.title: NIP Group (NASDAQ: NIPG) Co-CEO reports large Class B2 high‑vote stake
feed.summary: NIP Group Inc.'s Co-CEO, Hicham Chahine, has reported his initial beneficial ownership in the company's high-vote Class B2 ordinary shares. He directly holds over 18 million shares and indirectly controls more than 13 million through DIGLIFE AS, a company he largely owns. These Class B2 shares grant 20 votes each compared to Class A shares' one vote, significantly consolidating his voting power within NIP Group.

feed.title: Nektar Therapeutics Shareholders Urged to Seek Compensation for Losses
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Nektar Therapeutics on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 26, 2025, and December 15, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Nektar misled investors about the REZOLVE-AA clinical trial for its alopecia drug, failing to disclose issues with enrollment and protocol that led to overstated prospects. The trial ultimately failed to meet statistical significance, causing Nektar's stock price to fall and resulting in investor losses.

feed.title: Newton Golf 2025 10-K: $8.1M Revenue, $(1.63) EPS
feed.summary: Newton Golf (NWTG) reported fiscal 2025 net sales of $8.135 million, a 136% increase year-over-year, largely driven by strong adoption of its Motion shaft. Despite narrowed net losses due to the absence of prior financing costs, the company saw an increased operating loss of $(7.548) million and a net loss per share of $(1.63), pressured by higher SG&A and labor costs. Strategic highlights included a shift to 91% direct-to-consumer sales, increased brand momentum among touring professionals, and expanded manufacturing capacity.

feed.title: NIU PE Ratio & Valuation, Is NIU Overvalued
feed.summary: NIU Technologies (NIU) is currently classified as undervalued, with a fair price estimated between $10.82 and $11.63 compared to its current price of $2.79, indicating it is undervalued by 74.22%. Despite a higher-than-average P/B ratio relative to its 3-year average, its current P/S ratio of 0.33 is significantly below the competitor average of 4.35, though its -17.45% revenue growth makes its premium unsustainable. The article also provides a detailed breakdown of NIU's P/B, FCF Yield, Forward P/E, and Forward P/S ratios as of April 1, 2026.

feed.title: Short Interest in Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE:BLDR) Increases By 18.4%
feed.summary: Short interest in Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE:BLDR) surged by 18.4% in March, reaching 6,603,493 shares. This increase comes as the company's shares trade near their 52-week low and after missing Q4 earnings and revenue expectations. Despite a director's significant share purchase, analysts hold a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $126.65.

feed.title: Payoneer (PAYO) SVP Finance discloses 203,615-share ownership with RSU vesting
feed.summary: Michal Fridman, SVP Finance at Payoneer Global Inc. (PAYO), has filed an initial ownership report revealing a beneficial ownership of 203,615 shares of Common Stock. This figure includes restricted stock units (RSUs) that will vest over time based on her continuous service. The vesting schedule dictates that one-fourth of the RSUs vest on the first anniversary of the grant date, with the remainder vesting in approximately 1/16 installments quarterly.

feed.title: BMO Expands Digital Push With Tokenized Settlement And DollarGPS App
feed.summary: BMO is expanding its digital offerings through a collaboration with CME Group and Google Cloud to provide 24/7 tokenized cash settlement for institutional clients. Concurrently, the bank has launched the DollarGPS fintech app in the U.S. to enhance consumer financial wellness. These initiatives underscore BMO's commitment to advancing digital payments infrastructure and leveraging technology across both institutional and consumer banking sectors.

feed.title: Opera (NasdaqGS:OPRA) Valuation Check After MCP Connector Expands AI Capabilities In Neon Browser
feed.summary: Opera (NasdaqGS:OPRA) has introduced MCP Connector for its AI-focused Neon browser, allowing external AI clients like ChatGPT and Claude to access live browser sessions. Despite a recent 4.85% share price increase to US$14.26, Opera has seen an 11.10% decline over 30 days, though its 3-year and 5-year returns are 62.03% and 70.41% respectively, driven by its AI and Web3 initiatives. The market view suggests Opera is 33.7% undervalued with a narrative fair value of US$21.50, based on its earnings power and future cash flows, but faces risks from competitive pressures and investment costs.

feed.title: Is Chipotle’s National Burrito Day Game a Clue to Its Long‑Term Digital Strategy for CMG?
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill recently launched its "Burrito Vault: Double Protein Edition" game for National Burrito Day, offering prizes and zero delivery fees to engage Chipotle Rewards members. This initiative reflects Chipotle's strategy to use gamification and digital incentives to drive transaction growth amidst a softer consumer market and strong competition. The article highlights how such digital pushes, combined with menu innovation, align with Chipotle's broader investment narrative focusing on technology and marketing to stimulate incremental visits and support sales expectations.

feed.title: NetApp To Go Ex-Dividend On April 2nd, 2026 With 0.52 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) will go ex-dividend on April 2nd, 2026. Shareholders as of this date will receive a dividend of 0.52 USD per share. This article serves as an announcement for investors regarding the upcoming dividend payment.

feed.title: nCino (NCNO) Exceeds Expectations for Q4 Earnings and Revenue
feed.summary: nCino (NCNO) reported strong Q4 earnings, with $0.37 per share, significantly beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.21. The company also surpassed revenue expectations, generating $149.67 million for the quarter. Despite a year-to-date stock decline, investors are looking to future earnings estimates and management guidance for insights into nCino's prospects.

feed.title: Movado (NYSE: MOV) SVP sees 1,467 shares withheld to cover taxes
feed.summary: Movado Senior VP and General Counsel Mitchell Cole Sussis had 1,467 shares of common stock withheld for tax obligations on March 27, 2026. This transaction was related to stock awards granted on March 27, 2023, and the shares were valued at $24.05 each. After this withholding, Sussis directly holds 46,030 shares of Movado.

feed.title: Movado Group (NYSE: MOV) SVP stock award leads to 230-share tax withholding
feed.summary: Movado Group's Senior Vice President and Principal Accounting Officer, Linda Feeney, reported a routine tax-related share disposition where 230 shares of common stock were withheld by the company to cover tax obligations from vested stock awards. This non-market transaction on March 27, priced at $24.05 per share, leaves Feeney with 5,240 directly held shares of Movado common stock. The event is characterized as a standard administrative process rather than a market sale.

feed.title: Movado Group Inc (MOV) EVP uses 2,723 shares to cover tax withholding
feed.summary: Movado Group Inc.'s EVP & COO, Behzad Soltani, reported a routine tax-related share disposition where 2,723 shares of common stock, valued at $24.05 each, were withheld by the company. This action satisfied tax withholding obligations on vested stock awards, leaving Soltani with 81,042.204 shares directly held. This transaction is categorized as a tax-withholding disposition rather than an open-market sale, and is considered neutral in its impact on the company.

feed.title: Movado Group (MOV) SVP uses 2,155 shares to cover tax withholding
feed.summary: Movado Group's Senior Vice President of Human Resources, Michelle Kennedy, reported the disposition of 2,155 shares of common stock on March 27, 2026. These shares were withheld by the company at $24.05 per share to satisfy tax withholding obligations upon the vesting of previously granted stock awards. After this transaction, Kennedy directly holds 35,927.834 shares of Movado common stock.

feed.title: MaxCyte (MXCT) CEO awarded 600,000 options and 300,000 RSUs
feed.summary: MaxCyte (MXCT) CEO Masoud Maher was granted an equity compensation package including 600,000 stock options and 300,000 restricted stock units (RSUs). The stock options have an exercise price of $0.684 per share and expire in 2036, with vesting tied to continued service. The RSUs also vest over several years, contingent on his employment with the company.

feed.title: NNN REIT, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Details
feed.summary: NNN REIT, Inc. (NYSE: NNN) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 results before the market opens on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 10:30 a.m. ET to discuss its financial and operating results. A live webcast will be available on their website, with a telephonic replay accessible until May 14, 2026.

feed.title: Average basic shares outstanding of Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II – NASDAQ:MLAAW
feed.summary: This article provides access to the average basic shares outstanding data for Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II (NASDAQ: MLAAW) on TradingView. It indicates that the market was closed at the time of viewing and offers various financial and market data tools related to the company.

feed.title: Salesforce transforms Slackbot into the ultimate work assistant with 30 new AI features
feed.summary: Salesforce has introduced a major update to Slackbot, integrating 30 new AI features to transform it into a comprehensive work assistant. This update positions Slackbot as the primary interface for enterprise work, capable of orchestrating complex workflows, managing customer relationships, and providing real-time assistance across the desktop. The new features include "reusable AI skills" and enhanced connectivity through the Model Context Protocol, enabling Slackbot to act proactively and streamline tasks, even for small businesses lacking dedicated sales departments.
